title: Radial HUD
description: Display your hotbar as a circle. Similar to GTA's HUD.
body:
## RadialHUD
Display your hotbar as a circle. Similar to GTA's HUD.
Mod is entirely client-side. 

Requirements:
 - On fabric:
    - fabric api
 - On forge:
    - architectury api


<video src="https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/18114966/179347674-23abcd19-04da-4632-b834-ab22db9e9f94.mp4" controls width="100%">
